nasb.text: Also the earthenware vessel in which it was boiled shall be broken; and if it was boiled in a bronze vessel, then it shall be scoured and rinsed in water.

esv.text: And the earthenware vessel in which it is boiled shall be broken. But if it is boiled in a bronze vessel, that shall be scoured and rinsed in water.

cnv.text: 煮祭物的瓦器卻要打碎；如果煮祭物的是銅器，只需用水沖洗。

ccb.text: 用来煮祭肉的瓦锅，用后都要打碎。如果用的是铜锅，要擦干净并用水冲洗。
